name: Chris Hale
body: Yes, im crying…. The things she says just Blow my mind, im not sure i could say half of them….Y’all are in our daily prayer’s Bro….Along with many many people in churches around the country.Had a lady in our Church class say that when they pray, they call her their niece…. She has touched many!

name: Craig and Lisa Dotson
body: These posts and all of the love, fear, hope and raw emotions that go into them leave me speechless. Please just know that you’re all loved and prayed for. 🙏🩷

name: michael tarvin
body: Praying for more insight and wisdom for the doctors, medical team as to finding the cause and treatment for the current seizures. Peace and assurance for all of you, especially Lyla and family. ❤️ amy and mike

name: Emily Lee
body: Ugh...never underestimate the raw, untainted faith of a child who truly takes God at His word to depend fully on Him and not in ourselves. So sweet and pure. 🥲❤️Will continue to be praying for you all. And again...we are more than happy to help in any way.

name: Renee Runyon
body: My devotions this morning took me to Psalm 5. I am praying verses 11-12 over you today: "But let all who take refuge in You be glad; let them ever sing for joy. Spread your protection over them, that those who love Your name may rejoice in You. For surely, O Lord, You bless the righteous; You surround them with Your favor as with a shield."

name: Judith Klopfenstein
body: Lyla continues to be in our prayers as do all of you do too. 🙏❤️ xoxo

name: Jessica Wekke
body: We still think of and pray for her when we have family devotions.

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Praying now, that they can see what they need to see, in Lyla’s brain, and will know where to go with that information.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: We are continuing to pray for you all! I'm thankful she has great friends up there, but I'm praying she doesn't need to stay long. ♥
